# S03: Coverage Projection

**Goal:** Make requirement coverage visible in generated files.

## Tasks

- [ ] Add coverage tables to generated requirement or roadmap projections.
- [ ] Include covered, uncovered, and deferred states.
- [ ] Keep projection writes stable and atomic.
- [ ] Cover projection output in package tests.

## Acceptance

- Requirements projection shows linked plan items.
- Roadmap projection shows requirement references where useful.
- Regeneration is stable when coverage has not changed.
